cycript # Library not loaded: 2.0/usr/lib/libruby.2.0.0.dylib

cycript #cycript # Library not loaded: 2.0/usr/lib/libruby.2.0.0.dylib

cycript

Library not loaded: /System/Library/Frameworks/Ruby.framework/Versions/2.0/usr/lib/libruby.2.0.0.dylib

install_name_tool -change /System/Library/Frameworks/Ruby.framework/Versions/2.0/usr/lib/libruby.2.0.0.dylib /System/Library/Frameworks/Ruby.framework/Versions/2.3/usr/lib/libruby.2.3.0.dylib  ~/Downloads/cycript_0.9.594/Cycript.lib/cycript-apl

install_name_tool -change /System/Library/Frameworks/Ruby.framework/Versions/2.0/usr/lib/libruby.2.0.0.dylib /System/Library/Frameworks/Ruby.framework/Versions/2.3/usr/lib/libruby.2.3.0.dylib ~/Downloads/cycript_0.9.594/Cycript.lib/libcycript.dylib
